commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)
- pages/7: Stock Analysis (any ticker, MAs, volatility, company info)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add embed.js for GAS Lites iframe embedding on external sites

- GET /embed.js route serves IIFE that creates iframe to /book/{account}?embed=1
- Supports data-account, data-checkin, data-checkout, data-guests attributes
- /book/ route detects embed=1: sets frame-ancestors CSP, passes flag to renderer
- renderBookingPage in embed mode: transparent bg, hidden header, postMessage
  height reporting (MutationObserver + interval), Book Now opens in parent window
- Applied to both server.js and lite-server.js

No price = unavailable: admin grid yellow + V2 sync is_available fix

1. Admin grid: dates with no cm_price/direct_price now show yellow
   (blocked) instead of green, matching the unbookable state.

2. V2 Calendar sync: when Beds24 returns numAvail > 0 but no price,
   set is_available = false. A room without pricing cannot be booked.
   Applied to all 8 Beds24 V2 Calendar write locations.

Fix pivoting-agent lint: put search_skills/list_skills on same line as "do not"

The lint test checks per-line for search_skills()/list_skills() references
and only exempts lines containing "do not" or "never call". The prohibition
was split across two lines, so the line with the function names didn't match.

commit.message:
V1 fallback: fix skip logic — check date coverage not just priced rows

Rooms with a few V2 rows (all priced) were skipped because all_priced
check only compared existing rows. Villa Loupa had 5 priced rows but
rate rules cover 210 dates. Now skip only when existing priced rows
outnumber rate rule dates (PriceLabs rooms with full coverage).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add user profile API and fix server build

- Fix Gradle build by setting Java 17 (Corretto) in gradle.properties
- Fix isNewUser bug in AuthService (was always true)
- Add GET/PATCH /api/users/me endpoints (UserController, UserService, UserDto)
- Update CLAUDE.md: check off completed MVP items, add user profile API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

V1 fallback: INSERT rows for all dates covered by rate rules

Previously the fallback had separate UPDATE (for existing rows) and
INSERT (for zero-row rooms) paths. Rooms like Villa Loupa had a few V2
rows with prices, so they hit the UPDATE path which only touched NULL
prices — missing dates were never created. Now uses a single unified
path: INSERT ON CONFLICT for every date in rate rules, preserving
existing V2/PriceLabs prices with COALESCE.

commit.message:
Fix archive not syncing to Gmail and Supabase

The archive endpoint was calling Gmail API correctly but not updating
the labels in Supabase gmail_threads table. This meant archived threads
would reappear in smart inboxes on next load. Now the server removes
INBOX from the Supabase labels column, and the client updates the local
Supabase thread labels instead of removing it entirely (so it still
appears in All Mail but not Inbox/smart inboxes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix fonts not rendering (Cormorant Garamond / DM Sans)

@theme CSS variables used var(--font-cormorant-garamond) which is only
defined on <body> by next/font, not at :root where @theme generates
values. Now @theme uses direct font names, body overrides with next/font
optimized versions.

commit.message:

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: SSE keepalive pings prevent connection drop during agent loop

Root cause found: Baker produces excellent answers (50+ seconds,
4 iterations, 7 tool calls) but the SSE connection was silently
dropped during blocking Claude API calls (10-20s of no data).
The browser/proxy kills idle SSE connections.

Fix: Run the synchronous agent generator in a background thread,
bridge via asyncio.Queue, and send SSE keepalive comments every
8-10 seconds during silence. Also send tool_call notifications
as SSE data events (doubles as keepalive + UI hint).

The answer was always being generated — confirmed via GET /api/tasks
showing full deliverable with 1669 output tokens. The client just
never received it because the connection dropped mid-stream.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Scoring engine with practice-area-based firm matching
- Results show: tier match + compatibility bars + tier description with
  strengths/tradeoffs + 3 specific firm recommendations from our 38 profiles
- Share button (Web Share API with clipboard fallback)
- CTA funnels to /firms (paywalled) and /upgrade for conversion
- SEO-friendly metadata, allowed in robots.txt

Architecture:
- lib/firm-quiz-data.ts: questions, tier descriptions, firm recommendations,
  scoring engine (calculateResult)
- components/FirmQuiz.tsx: full interactive flow (intro → questions → results)
- app/firm-fit/page.tsx: simple server wrapper

with exports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix sandbox root path: use runtime env vars instead of compile-time CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR

CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR bakes in the nix store build path at compile time,
which doesn't exist at runtime on the server. Split into two env vars:
- CHOIR_SANDBOX_ROOT: broad working tree boundary (file ops, terminal, reports)
- CHOIR_WRITER_ROOT_DIR: where writer drafts/runs are stored
Both fall back to CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR for local dev.

- Delete forgot-password and reset-password pages (no longer needed)
- Simplify auth callback route (remove password recovery handling)
- Update middleware to remove deleted routes from public allowlist

- Fix input layout shift from password manager icons (relative h-10 wrapper)

commit.message:
Bulletin PDF : montants HS individuels par type (Art. 221)

- utils.py / views.py (×3 blocs) : calcul des montants individuels
  par type d'HS directement dans le PDF via salaire_base / 173,33 :
    · 4 prem. HS/sem.  → salaire_horaire × h × 1,30 (+30%)
    · Au-delà 4 HS/sem. → salaire_horaire × h × 1,60 (+60%)
  Auparavant : prime_heures_sup (total combiné) était affiché sur la
  ligne 30% uniquement si hs_60 == 0, sinon "-" pour les deux lignes.
- Correction label "HS\sem." → "HS/sem." (backslash invalide ReportLab)

feat: Phase 3 — MinIO media support (images, voice, files)

- Add @aws-sdk/client-s3, @fastify/multipart, sharp dependencies

- POST /api/conversations/:id/messages now accepts multipart/form-data
  with Sharp thumbnail generation for images (320px)
- GET /api/conversations/:id/messages returns attachment with presigned URLs

Android:
- Add Coil 3 for image loading (coil-compose, coil-network-okhttp)
- Add permissions: READ_MEDIA_IMAGES, CAMERA, RECORD_AUDIO + FileProvider
- Add Attachment model, update Message with optional attachment field
- Add uploadMessage() multipart endpoint in ApiService
- ChatViewModel: sendMediaMessage(), voice recording via MediaRecorder (AAC/M4A)
